name: Hurt on construction site but it's my employer's fault—can I sue them?

mainEntity.name: Hurt on construction site but it's my employer's fault—can I sue them?

acceptedAnswer.description: **No, workers' comp is exclusive remedy unless intentional harm (rare).** Utah/Idaho law bars employer suits for negligence.[2][4] Key factors: (1) Covers medicals/wages no-proof-needed; (2) sue third-parties instead; (3) retaliation illegal; (4) exceptions only deliberate acts.[3] File comp claim fast, document for third-parties. Lawyer identifies alternatives for full recovery.
